items.title: Get Govee’s Table Lamp 2 Pro with JBL audio and Matter support while down at its $135 low (Reg. $180), more
items.summary:
Before Amazon’s Big Spring Sale ends along with March, if you’ve wanted to add a smart lamp to any tables around your home, you can find the Govee Matter Table Lamp 2 Pro with a JBL speaker at $134.99 shipped. Going for $180 at full price, we’ve mostly seen discounts taking the cost down to $160 in 2026, with some falls lower to $155 and the $135 low, which was last seen in January. Now, while this savings event lasts, you can bring it home with a 25% markdown that cuts $45 off the tag for the all-time lowest price we have tracked. If you would prefer a lamp without the speaker at a much lower cost, there’s also Govee’s RGBIC Smart Table Lamp 2 with Matter for $55.99 shipped, down from $80 at its second-lowest price that sits $2 above its low. You can also find a massive roundup of other Govee smart devices getting up to 50% discounts and starting from $28 here.

items.title: Upgrade to a Dyson cordless vacuum, air purifier, or fan with up to 39% spring savings starting from $230
items.summary:
As part of the Amazon Big Spring Sale that will be ending with March, you can find Dyson’s popular vacuums, air purifiers, and fans getting up to 39% discounts during the closing window. If you want to get a model that has all you need at a lower price, I recommend the Dyson V8 Plus Cordless Vacuum package down at $329.99 shipped, which has served me well for nearly six years. It’s dropping down from its $540 full price, which has mostly only fallen to $350 over 2026, but you’re getting an even better 39% markdown during what’s left of this event, cutting $210 off the tag for the best price we’ve tracked since Black Friday and Christmas sales. Head below to browse through all the other models/devices benefiting from discounts while they last.
